activities.title: Separate Artifact Lifecycles
activities.description: Define distinct repository semantics for active plans, formalized specs, and global architecture knowledge.

activities.title: Refactor Planner Runtime Paths
activities.description: Move active planner path construction and plan-tool behavior from specs-root assumptions to plans-root behavior.

activities.title: Rewrite Prompt Contracts
activities.description: Update prompts, skills, templates, and AGENTS rules to align with the new lifecycle semantics.

activities.title: Triaged Legacy Packages
activities.description: Classify existing dated packages under specs by implementation status and route them to the correct destination.

activities.title: Validate Lifecycle Integrity
activities.description: Verify runtime, documentation, and migration rules remain consistent without silent fallback or auto-promotion.
